_disclaimer: Synthetic toy n8n workflow demonstrating the orchestration pattern. Generated 2026-06-07. No real calendar IDs, no real chat IDs, no real tokens, no real family data. Imports cleanly into n8n for shape inspection but will not produce real output without configured credentials.
name: Family Briefing (demo)

parameters._demoNote: Replace with your real calendar provider (Google Calendar, Outlook, CalDAV, etc). This URL is intentionally invalid.
Replace with your real weather provider. Latitude/longitude should come from secure env vars, not hardcoded.
Real chat IDs and bot tokens NEVER live in workflow JSON. Use n8n credentials store for the Telegram bot token and put the chat ID in an env var.
